name: report_guide_info
full_help:
report_guide_info

Description: 
Reports reuse metric for read_guide_info

Syntax: 
report_guide_info  [-quiet] [-verbose] [<file>]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<file>]    Filename to output results to. (send output to console if -file
              is not used)

Categories:

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
